entity.label: Seraiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A priest of the days of Jehoiakim (Neh. 12:1, 12).

nodes.label: Seraiah
nodes.description: A priest of the days of Jehoiakim (Neh. 12:1, 12).

verses.text: Which came with Zerubbabel: Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, Baanah. The number of the men of the people of Israel:
Now these are the priests and the Levites that went up with Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, and Jeshua: Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra,
And in the days of Joiakim were priests, the chief of the fathers: of Seraiah, Meraiah; of Jeremiah, Hananiah;
